idea-plugin.name: Mindmap - Call Graph Visualizer
idea-plugin.description:
Mindmap - Call Graph Visualizer

Visualize function call graphs as interactive mind maps inside your IDE. Place your cursor on any function and press Alt+G to view the call chain — callers, callees, and function depth.

🌐 Language Support

  • Kotlin — Full support (K1 & K2), IntelliJ IDEA & Android Studio

🎯 Key Features

  • Interactive Graph View - Hierarchical layout with drag, zoom, and pan
  • Tree View - Collapsible tree with SVG icons
  • Bidirectional Analysis - Outbound calls (children) + inbound callers (parents)
  • Click-to-Navigate - Click a node to jump to source code
  • Double-Click Trace - Merge a node's call graph into the view
  • Cmd+Click Expand - Re-center the graph on a node
  • Pan Mode - Drag nodes to move them; drag empty space to pan the canvas
  • Box Selection - Drag on empty canvas (select mode) to select and move multiple nodes
  • Navigation History - Navigate back/forward (Alt+← / Alt+→)
  • Search & Filter - Filter nodes by name
  • Library Code Toggle - Toggle library/SDK function calls
  • Hover Info Cards - Node tooltips with signature, file, depth, and LOC
  • Zoom Controls - Scroll wheel, zoom keys, fit view, center
  • Dark Theme - Catppuccin Mocha theme interface

⚡ Quick Start

  1. Place cursor inside any Kotlin function
  2. Press Alt+G (or right-click → Generate Mindmap)
  3. Explore the interactive call graph in the Mindmap tool window

🖱️ Controls

  • Pan mode (H): drag a node to move it; drag empty space to pan
  • Select mode (V): drag empty space to box-select multiple nodes
  • Right-drag / Middle-drag → pan the view
  • Scroll / Pinch → zoom in/out

Works with IntelliJ IDEA 2024.3+, Android Studio Ladybug+, and PyCharm 2024.3+.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.2

  • Performance First — Always-on high-performance rendering (disabled shadows/smoothing)
  • Restart & Clear — New button/shortcut (R) to wipe graph data and free memory
  • Clean Logic — Library/SDK code is now permanently excluded for maximum clarity and speed
  • Figma-style Interaction — Toggle between Pan (H) and Select (V) modes
  • Smart Navigation — Use Arrow keys to traverse parents, children, and siblings
  • Incremental Trace — Double-click a node to merge its call graph into the view
  • Seamless Expansion — Fixed "blue circle" UI artifacts during graph re-renders
  • Home Page Updates — Instant access to the official website and OS-aware shortcut labels

1.0.1

  • Fixed Android Studio tool window icon collision
  • Added Keyboard Shortcuts help modal (?)
  • Keyboard focus persists correctly in Tool Window after code navigation

1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Interactive graph view with hierarchical layout
  • Tree view with SVG icons and continuous connectors
  • Box/marquee selection for multi-node movement
  • Right-click / middle-click drag for panning
  • Navigation history (back/forward)
  • Double-click trace with position preservation
  • Smart duplicate name detection with filename
  • Bidirectional analysis (outbound + inbound calls)
  • Large file optimization (300 node cap, batch limits)
  • Crash-proof error handling across all entry points
  • JCEF fallback panel for Android Studio
  • Catppuccin Mocha dark theme

action.description: Generate a call graph for the selected function
